creator: dada@sbox.tu-graz.ac.at
text:
Update of textproc/c2html, textproc/java2html and textproc/perl2html
  to current version 0.9.1.

  Contents:
  - change of PORTVERSION from 0.7.2 to 0.9.1
  - remove of strip command in post-install target since original
    distribution already does strip on install
  - patch of distribution Makefile.in enhanced to make sure
    our NOPORTDOCS is respected

Fix: NOTE: The following patch updates all three ports
